productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Solid Black Tshirts
description: Composition Black t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a V-neck , short sleeves, ribbed neck, sleeve and shirt hems, has white lining along the neckline, sleeves and hem, and embroidered Big Ben logo on left chest Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this black t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The branding on the left chest enhances your royal fashion statement, while the sleeves contour your well-toned arms perfectly. Team this with jeans and sports shoes for that cool, casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
